name: KrillApp.Executor.LogicGate
title: Logic Gates
description: Reads boolean values from one or two source nodes (Pins or DataPoints), applies a logic gate operation (AND, OR, NOT, NAND, NOR, XOR, XNOR, BUFFER, IMPLY, NIMPLY), and writes the boolean result to a target node (Pin or DataPoint). Pin values are read as ON=true/OFF=false. DataPoint values are read as 1.0=true/0.0=false.
shortDescription: Applies boolean logic operations on source node values and writes the result to a target.
llmPurpose: Evaluates a boolean logic gate on one or two source node values and writes the result to a target Pin or DataPoint.
llmBehavior: reads boolean values from source nodes
supports re-entrancy protection to prevent circular triggers
llmInputs: 1-2 source nodes (Pin state or DataPoint snapshot)
llmOutputs: boolean result written to target Pin (ON/OFF) or DataPoint (1.0/0.0)
llmTypicalUseCases: combine two sensor states with AND logic
invert a pin state with NOT gate
create conditional logic between pins and data points
llmCreationHints: Create a LogicGate when the user needs boolean logic between nodes. Requires selecting a gate type, one or two sources, and one target. Sources and targets can be Pins or DataPoints.

llmConnectionHints.role: computation node that reads sources and writes to a target

llmExamples: If both sensors are ON, turn on this pin.
Invert the state of this GPIO pin.
AND these two temperature readings and write to a data point.
Create an XOR gate between these two inputs.
